prompt: You are fixing capability-evolver integration quality for this machine. Context: capability-evolver can run, MEMORY/USER are visible, but signal 'session_logs_missing' persists and evolution quality is degraded. Goal: implement minimal, safe fixes so capability-evolver can consistently locate and use recent session logs in this environment. Constraints: do not change unrelated systems; keep blast radius small; add clear docs. Deliverables: (1) a patch in the relevant repo/config paths, (2) /Users/ZenoWang/.openclaw/workspace/capability-evolver-sessionlogs-fix-report.md with root cause, exact changes, validation commands, rollback steps. Validation must include running capability-evolver once and confirming session_logs_missing is gone or clearly reduced with evidence. End report with READY_FOR_REVIEW.
